summary: Tested Agenda/Citas Médicas module end-to-end (backend + frontend) plus regression of existing modules. Backend: 26/26 pytest tests pass (incl. 8 new appointment tests covering CRUD, auth, _id exclusion, status persistence, invalid patient_id 404, list-by-date and list-by-month). Frontend: full Agenda flow works — login, sidebar nav, Spanish react-day-picker calendar (mayo 2026, lu/ma/mi/ju/vi/sa/do), Nueva Cita modal, patient search dropdown, save, edit/complete/delete, month counters, Dashboard 'Citas de Hoy' widget and both navigation buttons (dashboard-go-agenda and dashboard-view-agenda).

minor.issue: Returns 200 even when id does not exist (no 404). Idempotent delete is acceptable but inconsistent with other endpoints that throw 404 on missing resource.
When target id does not exist, endpoint silently returns {ok: true} instead of 404. Could mask client-side bugs.
No validation on date (YYYY-MM-DD) or time (HH:MM) format — invalid strings are accepted as-is, which would break the month/day filtering.
Uses unanchored regex — input is not validated/escaped. Low risk because endpoint is auth-protected, but defensive validation would be better.

ui_bugs.issue: Date field uses native browser date picker (input type=date) instead of shadcn Calendar component. Functional but inconsistent with the rest of the design system that uses react-day-picker.
Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent'. Add <DialogDescription> for accessibility.

Hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Likely caused by Emergent dev instrumentation wrapping option text in a span. Verify in production build; if it persists, render plain text inside <option>.

issues: Looks clean and consistent with the rest of the dashboard. Status badge 'programada' uses very light contrast — consider stronger color for accessibility.

action_items: (Optional) Return 404 in PUT/DELETE /api/appointments/{id} when the resource doesn't exist to be consistent with the rest of the API.
(Optional) Add Pydantic validators for ApptCreate.date (YYYY-MM-DD) and time (HH:MM).
Add <DialogDescription> to Nueva Cita modal to remove the a11y warning.
Investigate hydration warning for <span> inside <option> on Agenda duration select.
(Optional) Replace native HTML date input with shadcn Calendar component for design consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 668 lines and contains every domain (auth, users, patients, prescriptions, inventory, appointments, dashboard, settings, upload). Recommend splitting per resource (>700 line threshold near).
appointments collection misses index on (patient_id) — only (date, doctor_id) is created. List/filter by patient would benefit from an additional index when feature added.
list_appts uses unanchored regex on $regex with raw user input. Use a properly escaped/anchored value or build a date range query (date >= start AND date < end).
delete_appt does not check if the resource existed; returns 200 unconditionally. Same pattern in delete_patient/delete_inv/etc. Consider returning 404 when delete count is 0.
Frontend uses native <input type="date"> in Agenda.jsx (browser default picker) — inconsistent with the shadcn-based design system used elsewhere.
seed_data_creation: During test run created and cleaned up: patient 'TEST_Juan Garcia', prescription, inventory 'TEST_Paracetamol 500mg', user 'test_dr_lopez@medconsulta.com', appointment on 2026-05-15 (deleted) and one UI-created appointment on 2026-05-22 (deleted). Pre-existing appointment on 2026-05-07 10:30 with Antonieta is preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_medconsulta.py. To run: export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://clinic-flow-86.preview.emergentagent.com && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_medconsulta.py -v. Routes are in Spanish: /pacientes, /recetas, /inventario, /usuarios, /configuracion, /agenda. The Agenda time/type/duration fields are <select> elements (use page.select_option, not page.fill). The date field is a native <input type="date"> (use evaluate to set value). Calendar in /agenda uses react-day-picker — click day buttons via button[name="day"] filter has-text. window.confirm is used for delete confirmation — register dialog handler.
rca of the issue: No bugs found requiring RCA. The Agenda module is fully functional. Two cosmetic improvements worth tracking: (a) <input type=date> instead of shadcn Calendar (low impact), (b) DialogDescription missing for a11y.
